node.text: The beach where Deborah got married and discovered her love for surfing holds special memories of joy and peace for her.

node.text: Jolene is planning on learning to surf, has been gathering information, and got a beginners' guide to surfing.

node.text: Jolene agreed to plan a surfing adventure with Deborah for next month, pending schedule confirmation.

node.text: Jolene just started learning about surfing but hasn't gone yet.
